note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes (must name a test); pending = specified behavior whose implementation does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior, INV-22). Nothing is built yet, so every scenario is pending — this is the DESIGN GATE for the credential-delivery refactor (owner-approved 2026-07-22, from audits TG-153/TG-154). Scenarios bind to real code as tasks T-022-* land.

scenarios.name: High-value secrets are delivered as SecretRefs, never as plaintext environment values
An unresolvable credential refuses the operation with no plaintext fallback
The master key never resides in the worker and seal/unseal calls the external key service
The actuation SSH identity is resolved just-in-time and not persisted between actuations
A leased actuation credential expires after its bounded lifetime
The read-only triage plane cannot resolve an actuation credential
A resolved secret value never reaches a log, export, or error output
The image-signing key is resolved from the substrate, not a plaintext CI variable
